for_description:
ARE YOU A FITNESS FANATIC?

DO YOU LOVE A CHALLENGE?

HAVE YOU GOT WHAT IT TAKES?

An exciting all round fitness based team competition in the Lake District.



Home to some of the greatest scenery in the country; Ullswater in the heart of the Lake District will be host to one of the most proven and thrilling competitions in the country. Teams will compete head to head to find the toughest out there. Three male and three female athletes will unite to test their fortitude, mental stamina and teamwork.



Workouts are highly inclusive giving any ability and any age group the chance to compete all weekend. Movements tend to be basic but for increased difficultly scaled options are available. Workouts will leave you and your team crawling on the floor with your lungs on fire and your legs burning but you’ll have a huge sense of accomplishment.



Breathtaking beauty awaits any team brave enough to accept the challenge in the most perfect location for a fitness competition. Bring the family along and enjoy the spectacle. Enjoy great music, food and have fun all weekend.

address: Holme Styles Wood, Bare Bones Road, Holmfirth,  near: HD9 2DE
for_description:
Held over two day, WODland: The New Dawn is an outdoor functional fitness team competition like no other.

Mixed teams of six, three guys, three girls, will battle it out in seven different workouts held across the whole of the weekend. The best performing teams will then face off against each other in final workout to claim a place on the winners’ WODland podium.

Designed to push the teams to the limits of their fitness, the WODland workouts will take place in a UNIQUE HIDDEN TREE-LINED ARENA, specially created in the middle of a Yorkshire pine forest.

Precise details of the six workouts involved will be released on the day / night of the event, but expect the WODland workouts to combine all aspects of functional fitness, including lifting, shifting, carrying, dragging, running, sprinting, cycling, and climbing.

There’ll be food, drink, music, onsite parking, and bucketloads of atmosphere. All you need to bring is your team - oh and plenty of strength and stamina.

Team spaces are limited, so be quick. Grab five friends, get signed up, get involved!

The Bullet Point Open is our online community functional fitness competition and is all inclusive. Our goal is simple to bring everyone together through competition while making a positive impact on both our communities fitness and the greater community at large. Individual Prizes and Giveaways as well as a chance for gyms to earn equipment and build excitement and morale at their boxes during the cold winter months. In the past it has been all about Community, Comradery and Competition …. but this year we add a fourth “C” to that mix with Charity. Part of this years new Affiliate Team option will be a fundraising component which will play into that Affiliate/Gym Team’s score and could earn them bragging rights and some epic gear for their gym.

Format:Online Individual competing in 4 WODs over 3 Weeks

Divisions:Open Rx, Open Intermediate, Open Scaled, Masters 40+ Rx, Masters 40+ Scaled, Adaptive, Teen (13-17), Kids (12 and under)

Optional Division:Affiliate Team

Special Recognized Categories:Military, Law Enforcement, Firefighters, and First Responders

Difficulty:ALL LEVELS (Beginner to Advanced)

OPEN RX, INTERMEDIATE AND SCALED DIVISION – $25.00 PER PERSON

Rx division WODs will be attainable for most rx level to elite level athletes, we are programming WODs that require strategy and not just brute force strength and endurance. Using this concept they will not only be attainable for most intermediate level athletes that meet the movement requirements but will also be challenging for the most advanced athletes participating.

Intermediate division, newly added this year, will provide an option for both Rx and Scaled division athletes who may have felt to overwhelmed in the Rx division but maybe not challenged enough enough in the Scaled division.

Scaled division will be open to beginner levels of athlete. The movements will be basic movements that can be done by all levels with little to no scaling. The WODs will be designed to make this all levels division competitive and fun.

MASTERS RX, SCALED DIVISION (40+) – $25.00 PER PERSON

As always we love to acknowledge our masters athletes. Once Again we will be doing two separated division for Masters this year. This division will be for athletes that are 40 years of age or older as of January 1 and use the same workouts, weights and formats as the Rx/Scaled Open Division. Masters athletes MAY register either as a Masters or Open Rx/Intermediate/Scaled Division if they want to throw down with the youngins’.

AFFILIATE TEAM OPTION – $100 PER AFFILIATE/GYM

To make this even more of a community event we are putting a twist on this years team option. Instead of the normal M/F team combo option we normally do this year we will have the option for athletes or owners to register their affiliate as a team. This will require a minimum of 3 male athletes and 3 female athletes to be competing from the registered gym. Each workout we will total up the score of the top 3 male scores and top 3 female scores across all adult divisions and all adult athletes associated with that gym as their approver. These totaled scores will then be posted and ranked against the other participating affiliate teams. In addition to gaining points from the workouts, affiliates will also gain points on the leaderboard for total number of registrants, total number of Bullet Point Open merch items purchased, and total funds raised for their selected charity.

Upon completion the top Affiliate Team will receive banner to hang in the rafters at the gym, bragging rights of being the baddest ass gym in the region and not to mention some very epic gear for their gym. Just another way for us to give back to the amazing gyms in the area that support us.

TEEN/KID DIVISIONS – $25.00 PER PERSON

Due to popular demand we will be bringing back the teen and kids division this year. Teen division will be for athletes that are 17 years of age or younger as of January 1 while the kids division will be for athletes that are 12 years of age or younger as of January 1 . We feel that this event, being online, is the perfect opportunity for the kids involved in CrossFit Kids and youth programs around the state to get a taste of the competitive side of this sport in the security of their own box. Programming will be completed by CrossFit Kids/Brand X Method staff where we will try to mimic the movements and formats in the adult workouts. The division will allow for athletes to select “scaled” when submitting their score if they are unable to do any of the prescribed options. Marking a score as such will still place the athlete but rank them below Rx scores.

ADAPTIVE DIVISION – $25.00 PER PERSON

Adaptive athlete will compete in a singular division for the Bullet Point Open. We will be working with the coaches and athletes on providing options for the workouts for both standing/seated adaptive athletes. Much like the Youngsters division we will rely heavily on the coaches of these athletes to work with us on proper scaling for their athlete to best achieve the intent of the workout. The division will allow for athletes to select “scaled” when submitting their score if they are unable to do any of the prescribed options. Marking a score as such will still place the athlete but rank them below Rx scores.

MILITARY, LAW ENFORCEMENT, FIREFIGHTERS AND FIRST RESPONDERS

As always we wanted to give special attention to the people that help keep us safe and while we will not have special divisions for this, during registration you will have the option to select if you fall into any of these categories. We will be doing some prizes and swag for some of the top finishers in these categories!

for_description: The Cub Gamesis an annual 5-week competition that brings the world of fitness & fun to children around the world.In 2021, the magical competition celebrating Fitness, Fun and Community will run from February 2021 to March 2021. A workout will be released online every Thursday at 5pm, and each athlete will have until Wednesday 10am (AEST) the following week to lodge a score.It could be said that the highlight of this competition would be the participation and experience itself, however there will also be amazing prizes provided by top-notch sponsors.With 3 different age divisions, and perfect for ALL levels, The Cub Games strives to challenge every competitor beyond what they previously thought was possible. The Cub Games athletes will get to experience what it is like to sweat alongside their parents during the Open Season and have an absolute ball in the process.DIVISIONS – MALE/FEMALEFOX CUB: 7 -9 yearsBEAR CUB: 10-12 yearsLION CUB: 13 -15 years*Each division will have a workout suitable for beginner to the more advanced *The workouts have been designed and tested by Certified trainers, and equipment will be minimal. The competition is based around fun and of course safety.The Cub Games is all about community. In an effort to grow our community there will be information all year on training for the Cub Games, helpful nutritional tips for all of the family and awesome giveaways. Plenty to keep everyone happy until the Cub Games Season is upon us.

THE MOST EPIC EDITION EVER


The Freakest challenge has been forced to change it's final format, but still aims to go even bigger and bolder



The Freakest Challenge is a free to join, online qualifierevent, open to athletes from all over Europe and has two divisions


	Teams
	Individual Adaptive. 


The team competition only accepts one team per box, 2 males and 2 females, and it must be the owner or Head Coach who confirms who the members of that official team are.



THE ONLINE QUALIFIER

The Online Qualifier of this 6th edition consists of 3 workouts that will be announced between November 20th and November 23rd and whose results must be registered before December 20th at 23:59 (CEST). 4 weeks and 3 workouts to earn one of the 8 exclusive spots in the final.

No other formal registration is required, once the results are registered correctly the registration is complete.



THE FINAL

Only 8 privileged teams will access the exclusive Superfinal of February 6th - 7th.

At the Final, a draw will define the order of play for the elimination rounds and the 8 teams will battle each other head-to-head to define who the champion is.

8 will start, only 1 will take the title home



To find out more about this years Freakest Challenge, visit the official event page



2020EDITION OFFICIAL VIDEO

26 Engineer Regiment's first online Warrior Fitness Competition.

Open to all, no experience neccessary. Check out the video eitherhereor on Defence Connect and get signed up for the chance to win!!

COMPLETING THE WORKOUTS

Workouts can be submitted in any order, freeing you up to choose how you want to complete them. There are videos with each workout that explain the standards.

**DEADLIFT WORKOUT**

Please ensure you show the weights that are loaded onto the bar and ensure the whole bar is in the video all of the time.

VIDEO SUBMISSIONS

Please use the app WODProof to submit your videos. If you are unsure of how to use the app, please speak to SSgt Kinnear or Sgt Morath in 8 AES and they will be glad to assist where they can.

Workouts will focus on dumbbell, kettlebell,rowing, cleaning and bodyweight exercises (i.e. burpees/push ups/V-ups etc).We're going to test your strength and engine like never before.

for_description:
Join us on either Saturday 2ndOctober 2021 (scaled) or Sunday 3rd October 2021 (RX) for a mixed teams competition at CrossFit Southampton, a huge functional fitness space on the South Coast. Each team will take part in 3 workouts with the final 7 teams going through to the final.



Accessible to all abilities, this flagship teams event will feature a mix of fast-paced functional fitness workouts using kit you’re familiar with and an outdoor agility event with equipment you’re less familiar with! It’ll be an all-round fun filled day!



Refreshments including top quality coffee, energy drinks and snacks will be available on the day, with lunch from our friends at The Hog Shack available to pre-order



Workout demos and movement standards will be announced online in the week leading up to the competition.



Entry is £35 per person and can be purchased using the link below – places are very limited! No need to give your team names just yet, we’ll be in touch nearer the time.



Grab your team mates and get signed up! Early bird pricing until the end of March 2021 with codeEARLYBIRD10



Unsure whether to sign up to RX or Scaled?

RX athleteswould need to be able to perform the following movements and weights (male/female) as a guide. This does not mean these specific movements will be featured, it’s just a guide:


	TTB
	Pull Ups
	Thrusters 50kg/35kg
	Deadlift 100kg/70kg
	GTOH – 70kg/45kg


Scaledentry would be suitable for anyone unable to perform the RX standards as long as they have a basic understanding of the fundamental movements in CrossFit. An example of the types of movements and weights you’d need to be able to perform would be:


	Hand Release Press Ups
	Ab Mat Sit Ups
	Single Unders
	Jumping Pull Ups
	Thrusters – 35kg/20kg
	Deadlift – 70kg/50kg
	GTOH – 45kg/30kg


If you have any questions regarding the RX or Scaled standards, get in touch.

for_description:
Trinity War same sex 3's is the UK's premier indoors + outdoors functional fitness event. Teams will take on a number of workouts across the weekend that will test a broad spectrum of fitness.

Teams can expect multiple surfaces and workout areas. Including a pool event. Please note the pool event will be structured so if a team wishes, only one athlete needs to swim.

Trinity War has functional fitness at it's core. You can expect lifting, running, carrying, odd objects, and new equipment. There is NOT a gymnastics rig at Trinity War events

If teams are unsure which category they should enter, we recommend that they take a look at our Workout Library linked below. This includes every BFMG workout ever released, including the 2019Trinity War workouts for Compete and Throwdown categories

Catergories

Compete

The Trinity War 'Compete' category is for athletes who would usually compete at the RX level. In previous BFMG events they will have competed in our Elite category, or have been comfortable in our Middle Ground category.

Throwdown

The Trinity War 'Throwdown' category is for athletes who would usually compete at the Intermediate or Scaled level. In previous BFMG events they will have competed in our Scaled category, or have challenged theirselves in our Middle Ground category

Masters

We currently have a Masters category available in our Throwdown standard. Teams will complete the same workouts as the open aged Throwdown teams, however they will compete alongside other Masters teams, and be ranked in both a separateleaderboard, as well as the main one.

Masters teams must have a minimum combined age of 110 years (including months) on the first day of competition

title_name: The Battle Cancer CrossFit Challenge Belfast
address: 2 Cloughfern Avenue Monkstown Industrial Estate  Newtownabbey BT37 OUH
for_description:
28 AUUST2021 - 8am - 5pm

BLK BOX HQ
2 Cloughfern Avenue
Monkstown Industrial Estate
Newtownabbey
BT37 OUH

Your next fitness fundraising challenge.

Enlist your team, set yourself a goaland take part in an epic day. Battle Cancer competitions present a unique team-based experience for people looking to make a difference and kick cancer to the dust.



ALL THE CRAIC IN BELFAST

As COVID-19 continues to create uncertainty in the events industry and Brexit presents new challenges for2021, we've decided to relocate our normal Dublin event to Belfast for this year.

​

THE PHYSICAL CHALLENGE

Your team of four will take on four 9-minute functional fitness workouts incorporating teamwork, high-intensity cardio, FUN-ctional fitness, and accessible weights

As always, our workouts will be accessible, fun and challenging whether you’re a seasonedathlete, regular gym-goer or competition newbie.



THE FUNDRAISING CHALLENGE

Fundraising AMRAP: As Much Raised As Possible

Your first workout isn't to do with any fitness. It doesn't even take place on competition day. It starts as soon as you sign up!

​

You and your team will fundraise your hardest to earn aplace on the leaderboard ahead of the four workouts on event day.

​

Here's how it works:


	
	Sign up your team and choose a cancer charity to support
	
	
	Receive your fundraising pack with ideas of how to fundraise and donate directly to your charity
	
	
	Screenshot your fundraising total and submit your figure at registration on event day
	
	
	Get ranked on the Battle Cancer leaderboard! The more you raise, the higher you'll place
	


Expect our iconic Battle Cancer live DJ sets, mass warm-up and incredible vibe, along with CLIC Sargent NI and brand partners at our partner BLK BOX's brand new HQ.





ACCESSIBLE MOVEMENTS

Everyonecan do it. We program fourpumping workouts made up of creative movements using simple equipment. Think sports day. But for adults.

Weight standards for men/women:

Bumper plate - 20kg/10kg

Dumbbell - 20kg/12.5kg

Kettlebell - 20kg/12kg​

​

Workouts may also include bodyweight, CV machines such as rowers, ski ergs, and bikes, as well as other equipment but will not exceed the weights above.



Heavier kit such as sandbags may be used but workouts will allow athletes to work together to lift them.



WHAT YOU GET

FUNDRAISING PACK

Tips and tricks on how to fundraise as much as possible and dedicated fundraising reps from our partner charities

12-WEEK BATTLE PLAN FITNESS PROGRAM

12 weeks of FREE fitness programming delivered online viaFitr Trainingdesigned to get you and your team moving and ready to take on a Battle Cancer event

TEMPORARY TATTOO & OTHER GOODIES

Wear your temporary Battle Cancer tattoo with pride! Take advantage of special offers and goodies from our partners, WIT, NOCCO, BLK BOX, Hyperice and more

BATTLE CANCER RIBBON PATCH

At the end of your last workout, you and the other teams in your heat will cross a finishers line where you'll be awarded your Battle Cancer patches

title_name: The Battle Cancer CrossFit Challenge Manchester
for_description:
THE PHYSICAL CHALLENGE

Your team of four will take on four 9-minute functional fitness workouts incorporating teamwork, high-intensity cardio, FUN-ctional fitness, and accessible weights

As always, our workouts will be accessible, fun and challenging whether you’re a seasonedathlete, regular gym-goer or competition newbie.



THE FUNDRAISING CHALLENGE

Fundraising AMRAP: As Much Raised As Possible

Your first workout isn't to do with any fitness. It doesn't even take place on competition day. It starts as soon as you sign up!



You and your team will fundraise your hardest to earn aplace on the leaderboard ahead of the four workouts on event day.



Here's how it works:


	Sign up your team and choose a cancer charity to support
	Receive your fundraising pack with ideas of how to fundraise and donate directly to your charity
	Screenshot your fundraising total and submit your figure at registration on event day
	Get ranked on the Battle Cancer leaderboard! The more you raise, the higher you'll place


Expect our iconic Battle Cancer live DJ sets, mass warm-up and incredible vibe, along with CLIC Sargent NI and brand partners at our partner BLK BOX's brand new HQ.





ACCESSIBLE MOVEMENTS

Everyonecan do it. We program fourpumping workouts made up of creative movements using simple equipment. Think sports day. But for adults.

Weight standards for men/women:

Bumper plate - 20kg/10kg

Dumbbell - 20kg/12.5kg

Kettlebell - 20kg/12kg



Workouts may also include bodyweight, CV machines such as rowers, ski ergs, and bikes, as well as other equipment but will not exceed the weights above.



Heavier kit such as sandbags may be used but workouts will allow athletes to work together to lift them.



WHAT YOU GET

FUNDRAISING PACK

Tips and tricks on how to fundraise as much as possible and dedicated fundraising reps from our partner charities

After a tough year or so CrossFit Volentia Events are back and we're back with a bang.

Join us at ourSame Sex Pairs event here on the 25th of Julyand get ready for an amazing day of competition!

As a well of a full day of fitness(including 4 WODS for every team) you'll find food, drink and clothing vendors on the day so you can get some shopping done between workouts, PLUS live music over lunch. Also, spectators get in free, so bring the family. Happy days!

Sponsors/ vendors

We're very lucky to welcome some fantastic sponsors and vendors on the day:

-NOCCO

-Barebells

-The Defiant co.

-Cannonball Coffee Company

-Twisted Kitchen wood fired pizzas

-Kieran Taylor music



Ready to sign up? Check out the movement requirements below, choose your category and grab your ticket (ONLY 1 TICKET IS NEEDED PER TEAM).



Scaled categories:

- Full range of motion on bodyweight movements (knees to floor on lunges, hip crease below parallel on squats etc)

- Barbell movements at 40kg (Male) 25kg (female)

- Wallballs 9/6kg

- Kettlebell movements 16/12kg

- Dumbbell movements 15kg/10kg

- Hanging knee raises

- Partner assisted pull ups

- Single skips

NOTE: The workouts are not limited to the above, these are guidelines only to give you an idea of movements that are likely to come up.

RX categories:

- Full range of motion on bodyweight movements (knees to floor on lunges, hip crease below parallel on squats etc)

- Barbell movements at 60kg (Male) 40kg (female)

- Wallballs 9/6kg

- Kettlebell movements 24/16kg

- Dumbbell movements 22.5kg/15kg

- All high level RX movements like: Pistols/ Toes to bar/ Pull ups/ HSPU etc.

- Double unders

NOTE: The workouts are not limited to the above, these are guidelines only to give you an idea of movements that are likely to come up.



Ready to sign up? Book your ticket today so that you don't miss out. More information will be sent out to you leading up to the event. See you in July!

NOTE: If in the unfortunate event we have to cancel this competition due to the issues around COVID-19, tickets will be refunded in full (minus eventbrite fees). We are dedicated to keeping our gym as safe as possible in general and with regards to COVID-19, the event will be run within government guidelines.

#TEAMVOLENTIA

The Irish Fitness Championships Online



For the first and hopefully last time ever we are taking the IFC online.

The format will be similar to what we saw with the quarter finals and age group qualifiers and will take place on the 16th, 17th and 18th of July depending on what division you enter.

And for the first time ever we will be introducing a Concept 2 division!!!! 3 workouts using the C2 bike, rower and ski erg!!!!

Friday, Saturday and Sunday

Saturday

The choice is yours - Run it your way! But run it the SUPERHUMAN WAY!

Sign up TODAY to be part of this summer's challenge!

address: 40-46 Albert road, St Phillips, Bristol, BS2 0XA
for_description:
This is a competition for teams made up 3 same-sex team members.! It is an entry-level competition for beginners looking to get competition experience, have fun and maybe win some prizes along the way. If you’re new to functional fitness or competing then this is the comp for you!

The comp is comprised of 4 WOD’s with all teams doing all 4, and all team members participating in each of the workouts. And there is something for everyone – workouts are designed to let beginners shine in their areas of strength and push their boundaries in others. As a beginners comp, you can rest assured there won’t be any technical gymnastics and weighted elements can be scaled. There really is no reason why anyone wanting to compete can’t get involved!

On the day we have a food vendor, great coffee and plenty of snacks, and the prize stash is well worth winning!

Our judges are friendly and supportive and we release the WODs the week before so participating athletes have a chance to game plan and practice them. A full briefing takes place on the morning of the competition so you can be sure of movement standards and ask any questions you may have.

It takes place on Sunday 3rd October. Entry for the whole team is £105. Spectators are welcomed at no charge and with the mezzanine you are sure to get a great view!

More is in Facebook so be sure to keep an eye on our competition page for all the latest news and developments. For more information, please email:scaleitup@valesco.fitness, or BOOK YOUR PLACE using the form on this page register your team today!

https://valesco.fitness/valesco-events/scale-it-up-triple-threat-21/

for_description:

Our competitions bring together all types of women through Competing for a Cure.

Same-Sex Teams of 3 Badass Ladies!

4 Workouts, no finals!

The CrossFit Volentia Same sex 3's Throwdown 2021



Grab 2 mates of the same sex and get ready for a packed day of competition here at CrossFit Volentia!



With great prizes on offer, challenging WODS, multiple vendors, amazing food and a community driven event, you're guaranteed an awesome time here in September! There will be 3 challenging workouts for all teams and you'll be tested in all aspects of functional fitness including; gymnastics, weightlifting, endurance and strength!



Useful information:


	No qualifiers.
	3 Challenging WODS for all teams. Lowest points after 3 WODS wins!
	Prizes for all podium finishers
	Food and drinks available on the day.
	Clothing, food and drink vendors
	Spectators get in for free, so bring the whole family.
	Amazing photos from Ded Pixel Photography




Movement standards:

Athletes will need a good understanding of basic CrossFit movements (KB's, DB's, Barbell and bodyweight movements.

Any high skill gymnastics movements will have scaling options and barbell weights will either be accessible or will be programmed in a way where your team choose the barbell weight.

This will be a very challenging, but inclusive event. Expect anold school, full on CrossFit comp that's going to leave you feeling exhausted, but elated!



Purchase your ticket today to guarantee your team spot, only 1 ticket needed per team. Once your team captain has purchased your ticket he/she will be able to invite the other two teammates to join the team and sign the online waiver. Please do this ASAP.

More details will be sent to you via email and posted on our notice board here on the Throwdownhub building up to the event.

We hope to see you here at CrossFit Volentia in September!

address: Unit 1, Blue Chip Business Park, Atlantic Street Altrincham Manchester WA14 5DD United Kingdom
for_description:
Back on the dancefloor.........after a horrendous 2020 due to the 'Vid.

This time though we are going BIGGER! BIGGER TEAMS = MORE FUN!

This will be a SCALED/SCALED + & Masters event for Mixed Teams of 6 (3 Male and 3 Female competitors).

As with all of our competitions we will be focusing on it being FUN, ALL INCLUSIVE and just an epic day out with yours friends......along with the chance to showcase your fitness.

Plus you get a FREE beer straight after your last workout.......So what's not to like. Ha ha ha.

Can't wait to see you all.

The FIRST EVER CrossFit Triathlon IS HERE!

We are organizing this as a fundraiser with 30% of money made (5% from each division) going towards a non-profit organization(s) of the 1st place winner's choice from each divisions.

We will have multiple vendors at the event and have prizes for top finishers.


WHAT IS THIS CRAZINESS?

We know it is not a true Triathlon but in CrossFit we like to get crazy with things. The Wild One Triathlon will be a rowing version of a Sprint Triathlon with movements we do in CrossFit regularly added into the transitional parts of a typical Triathlon.

For Time:

2k row

50 burpees over bar

"Grace"*

20k road bike

50 burpees over bar

"Isabel"*

5k run

*"Grace" = 30 power clean & jerks

*"Isabel" = 30 power snatches

Weights:
135 for men

95 for women/scaled men

65 for scaled women

Divisions:
Individual Men

Individual Women

Individual Scaled Men (barbell weight)
Individual Scaled Women (barbell weight)

Pairs (any pair)

Scaled Pairs (any pair, barbell weight)

WHAT EQUIPMENT WILL BE PROVIDED?

We will provide the rowers and barbell work, you must provide yourself with your own bike.

WHERE IS THIS FITNESS FUN HAPPENING?

This event will be ran at CrossFit Untamed with all transitions and half way points being at the gym for pair switches or as a check mark point for Individuals.

WHEN IS IT?

Saturday, September 18th, 2021

We will possibly have the showing of the Eddie v Thor Fight Night card after the event! We will announce for sure when we get closer to the event

HOW MUCH AM I PAYING TO DO THIS MADNESS?

All registered participants will receive an event shirt, event bib number, and a athlete bag full of goodies from our sponsors. 30% of the registration fee is going towards the donation fund to whatever non profit organization(s) the top winners choose.


	Individual registration = $100
	Team registration = $150


If you choose to register, do so as soon as possible.

Registration will be closed a week before the event to organized heats and make final preparations.

If registering as a pair, just have one person pay for the $150 registration fee.

MORE INFO ON SPONSORSHIPS, THE RACE ROUTE, AND ETC WILL COME EVERY SO OFTEN LEADING UP TO THE EVENT ON SOCIAL MEDIA(@crossfituntamed), THIS PAGE, AND VIA EMAIL.

WANT TO HELP SPONSOR OR VOLUNTEER FOR THIS EVENT?
Please email Coach KP atKendrauntamed@gmail.com

for_description:
Event Overview

Be Defiant is throwing the best CrossFit competition theMidlands has ever seen, our first event will be a same sex pairs throwdown on 16thand 17thApril 2022. We want to celebrate everything we love about functional fitness and more specifically howbeing active positively affects our mental health. There will be a range of vendors and event partners on site for the event for you to browse between workouts. Be Defiant Pairs will be structured to allow every one of any level to take part and test themselvesboth physicallyand mentally by splitting the weekend into two days. Saturday the 16thApril 2022 will be Scaled and Sundaythe 17th April 2022 will be RX.

Physical Challenge

Be Defiant Pairs will be hosted at CrossFit Derby which is a well-established CrossFit Affiliate making it the perfect venue for our first event. CrossFit Derby’s Head Coach Luke Townsend will be programming events to test your mental and physical fortitude using classic CrossFit inspired formatting. A range of equipment will be used to provide a well-rounded test which will include but is not limited to Concept 2 Rowers, Air Bikes, Dumbbells, Kettlebells, Plyometric Boxes, Gymnastics Rigand of course the mighty Barbell.

Which category should you enter? Don’t worry, we have you covered! Prior to the competition a series of workouts will be released for pairs to complete and submit. Your scores from these workouts will determine your category and therefore the day you compete to ensure athletes of similar abilities will be competing against each other. Movement demonstrations and standards will be given on the day.

Qualifiers

Qualifying workouts will be released 01/01/2022 and will need to be completed by the 28/02/2022. The qualifying workouts will be emailed to each pair and an online submisson of scores will be needed by 28/02/2022.

Our Goal

Our goals for this event are to make sure that each athlete is challenged while having a fantastic time in a supportive and encouraging environment, along with showing how being active positively affects our mental health. Whether you are entering Be Defiant Pairs as your first competition or you are a seasoned athlete we want to ensure that a well-rounded test of fitness along with a day of fun and community is had by everyone.

Entry to Be Defiant Pairs will be £65 per pair - Places are limited to 26pairs each day(13 female &13 male) so make sure that you don’t miss out and book your spot!

EARLY BIRD SPECIAL - Book before 31/01/2022 and receive £10 off the total amount - Use code BDEARLYBIRD

Accessible to all abilities, this flagship teams event will feature a mix of fast-paced functional fitness workouts using kit you’re familiar with and an outdoor agility event with equipment you’re less familiar with! It’ll be an all-round fun filled day!



Refreshments including top quality coffee from our in-house coffee shop ‘Coffee Box’, energy drinks and snacks will be available on the day too.



Workout demos and movement standards will be announced online in the week leading up to the competition.

Scaledentry would be suitable for anyone unable to perform the RX standards as long as they have a basic understanding of the fundamental movements in CrossFit. An example of the types of movements and weights you’d need to be able to perform would be:

The CrossFit Volentia Same sex 3's Throwdown is back!

Grab 2 buddies of the same sex (FFF or MMM) and get signed up for a packed day of competition here at CrossFit Volentia.

With great prizes on offer, plus various vendors on the day, you're guaranteed an awesome time here in October! There will be plenty of challenging workouts and you'll be tested in all aspects of functional fitness including; gymnastics, weightlifting, endurance and strength!

Useful information:

- No qualifiers.

- Open category which is accessible for all abilities. There will be scaling options available for some of the more advanced RX movements. You WILL be able to compete and you WILL be challenged no matter your level of fitness/ experience!

- 3 Vareid, challenging WODS for all teams.

- Prizes for all podium finishers

- Food and drinks available on the day

- Spectators get in for free, so bring the whole family

- Amazing photos from the day from Ded Pixel Photography



Movement standards:

You will need a good understanding of all of the foundational CrossFit movements (KB swing, barbell movements, wallballs, bodyweight movements etc). We will ensure that all WODS are accessible to you and your teammates, scaling options will be available if needed.

Fear not, just because the WODS are accessible to all DOES NOT mean that they will be easy! Our competitions are aimed at being both FUN and CHALLENGING!



More information will be sent to you directly closer to the event. This will include:

- Parking information

- Timings for the day.

- A request for team information

etc.



We hope to see you here at CrossFit Volentia in October!

THE EAGLE THROWDOWN22'-23'

Powered By CrossFit Volentia

	Individual event with online qualifiers and live finals to be held at CrossFit Volentia.

	Scaled finals (masters and open) 22nd January 2023

	Each podium finisherat the live finals to receive a minimum of £100 RRP worth of prizes.
	HUGE PRIZE worth over £800 for the gym with the most athletes signed up to the online qualifiers courtesy of RAZE STRENGTH.


Event cost:


	Online qualifiers £10 per person (+ fees)
	Finals tickets £35 per person (+ fees)


Equipment needed for qualifiers


	Phone or tablet to record workouts OR someone to judge and verify score (minimum CF-L1 or judge cert required)
	Rig with pull up bar and rings
	Barbell, bumper plates and clips
	Kettlebells

Movement standards/ info




	All categories require full range of motion on movements (i.e hip crease below parallel on squats, knees to floor on lunges etc)
	All athletes require agood understanding of all aspects of Crossfit Training (competent with olympic weightlifting, KB movements etc)
	Barbell weights will be accessible or chosen by the athlete for the qualifiers.
	As a general rule, if you normally complete most workouts at your gym RX then choose RX, if you mostly choose Scaled then please choose a scaled category. Same goes for masters RX and Scaled.


Our goal is to unite the community andgive athletes a focus throughout the colder months and a chance to bag a top 20 spot and an invite to the live finals at CrossFit Volentia in January!Don't miss out, grab your ticket today and we will see you on the leaderboard!


Tickets for this event are non-refundable.

ACTUAL TOTAL kgs x SINCLAIR COEFFICIENT = SINCLAIR TOTAL

CrossFit Sheffield's Winter Throwdown
Announcing our Winter Throwdown!!!

The third in our series of Throwdowns. A bit of an excuse to put the mince pies down and get some focussed training in.

There is a guarantee of fantastic workouts, laughs, a good crowd, excellent judges and a compere who get's a little over excited! :P


Entry price is £40 per team.

We are limiting the entries to keep the timings smooth and not waiting around too long so jump on quick before all the tickets are gone.


There will be both Rx and Scaled divisions with movement standards as follows;

Rx
- Pull Ups

- Toes To Bar

- Barbell Movements at 50kg/30kg.Ish.

- Double Unders

- DB's at 22.5/15kg

- Single Leg Overhead Squat on a Swiss Ball

Scaled

- Rack Rows

- Hanging Leg Raises

- Barbell Movements at 30/20kg. Ish.

- Singe Under Skips

- DB's at 15kg/10kg


We're lucky enough to have a big gym so plenty or room for spectators and mini spectators to come along and cheer.
DJ putting out some great music, coffee, smoothies, snacks and treats.

For this competition we ask that just one athlete registers their team here, and please shoot us an email with your team name and athlete names toinfo@crossfit-sheffield.co.uk.

Thanks so much and we cannot wait to welcome you in January.

Athens Throwdown is an event for athletes who love fitness, and it is divided into two parts, the Qualifiers and the Finals. The Qualifiers are held online, while the Finals take place at the Olympic Stadium of Taekwondo & Handball, Athens, Greece, with an Individual and a Team edition.

Athens Throwdown 2020-TWO finals will take place on 06-07-08/05/2022! Already qualified Individuals and Teams keep their spots in the finals, while Τeams have the right to change up to two athletes. Spectators tickets are available now onhttps://www.athensthrowdown.com/index.html!
